creator: krentel@rice.edu
text:
In the netpbm-94.3.1 port, pnmmerge doesn't know about pnmpad.

Fix: In /usr/ports/graphics/netpbm/work/netpbm/pnm/pnmmerge.c,
I added the line:

    TRY("pnmpad", pnmpad_main);

and deleted .build_done, reran make, and it seems to work.
How-To-Repeat: Install the netpbm-94.3.1 package or port.  Try to run 
/usr/X11R6/bin/pnmpad.

% /usr/X11R6/bin/pnmpad
pnmmerge: "pnmpad" is an unknown PNM program!
%
